top5_order: Reciprocity of Numbers and Prime Factorization

chapter_bridges.qa_native_rewrite: Restate the chapter entirely inside Z/9Z and preserve only residue-class consequences.
chapter_bridges.promotion_condition: No semantic content remains outside modular arithmetic after the rewrite.

chapter_bridges.qa_native_rewrite: Reduce the 24-wheel chapter to residue filters in Z/24Z and keep necessity versus sufficiency explicit.
chapter_bridges.promotion_condition: The resulting statement is a valid wheel filter and does not overclaim primality.

chapter_bridges.chapter: Reciprocity of Numbers and Prime Factorization
chapter_bridges.qa_native_rewrite: Recast reciprocity as factor-pair symmetry, factor graphs, or difference-of-squares recovery.
chapter_bridges.promotion_condition: The structure must encode recoverable factor information on tested examples.

chapter_bridges.qa_native_rewrite: Convert all classes to exact predicates over congruence, tuples, or recursion laws.
chapter_bridges.promotion_condition: Every promoted class has deterministic membership and explicit non-members.

chapter_bridges.qa_native_rewrite: Treat geometry only as an invertible witness layer over semiprime arithmetic.
chapter_bridges.promotion_condition: The geometry must decode back to the factor data on test cases.
